revision.comment: link to category on Commons is now defined on wikidata
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT\:[^]]+}}" to ""
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 15:47:52
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "DEFAULTSORT:" to "citation needed|"
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
==Old Content== {{Portal|Japan|Asia|History}} {{Navseasoncats}} {{Commons category}} {{citation needed|1940s In Japan}}
==Categories==
[[en:Category:1940s in Japan]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:1940s by country|Japan]] [[Category:1940s in Asia|Japan]] [[Category:20th century in Japan]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Decades in Japan]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Shōwa era]]

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
==Old Content== {{Portal|Japan|Asia|History}} {{Navseasoncats}} {{Commons category}} {{citation needed|1940s In Japan}}
==Categories==
[[en:Category:1940s in Japan]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:1940s by country|Japan]] [[Category:1940s in Asia|Japan]] [[Category:20th century in Japan]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Decades in Japan]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Shōwa era]]

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q7330179)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Portal|Japan|Asia|History}}
{{Navseasoncats}}
{{Commons category}}
{{citation needed|1940s In Japan}}
{{wikidata link|Q7330179}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:1940s in Japan]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:1940s by country|Japan]]
[[Category:1940s in Asia|Japan]]
[[Category:20th century in Japan]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]
[[Category:Decades in Japan]]
[[Category:Shōwa era]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove legacy category-page templates ({{デフォルトソート}}, {{citation needed}}) [[git:Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22502775894|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{Portal|Japan|Asia|History}} {{Navseasoncats}} {{Commons category}} {{wikidata link|Q7330179}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:1940s in Japan]] <!--categories--> [[Category:1940s by country|Japan]] [[Category:1940s in Asia|Japan]] [[Category:20th century in Japan]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Decades in Japan]] [[Category:Shōwa era]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1940s_in_Japan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1940s_in_Japan for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <!--templates--> {{Portal|Japan|Asia|History}} {{Navseasoncats}} {{Commons category}} {{wikidata link|Q7330179}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:1940s in Japan]] <!--categories--> [[Category:1940s by country|Japan]] [[Category:1940s in Asia|Japan]] [[Category:20th century in Japan]] [[Category:Decades in Japan]] [[Category:Shōwa era]]
